description: Rigorous k=3 upper bound for Turan's C_42 constant, far below Griego's two-block record
certification_notes: Interval path evaluated with mpmath.iv at dps=50, terms=4000, QN=850, Qp=4 with validated quadrature remainder bound from c42_quadrature_remainder. 2D quadrature interval weights include correct ba/2 outer and wj/2 inner scaling. Certificate valid for all boxes half-width 1e-12 around the listed point. Constraint margin ~6.6e-7. Empirical QN convergence 400->2000 shows float C stable to ~2e-10. alpha = 1.00476+0.36310i (i.e. 1-alpha nearly pure imaginary); t2 and t3 nearly equal, forming a very thin third band near u=0.9595.
